title: Is End of Evangelion your FAVORITE movie
display_title: Is End of Evangelion your FAVORITE movie
wikitext:
[]: Is End of Evangelion your FAVORITE movie?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Apr 02, 2009 7:04 pm I got the idea from the anime topic . Is End of Evangelion one your favorite movies? For me it is and it my favorite animated movie next to Akira and Lion King, not to mention that I would put it on my Top 10 favorite movies list also.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Thu Apr 02, 2009 7:19 pm FUCK NO. NO NO NO NO NO you think being mind raped would be my favourite...?

[]:             Quote Post by GaijinOtaku » Thu Apr 02, 2009 7:24 pm Yes. Yes it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Apr 02, 2009 7:24 pm I love the movie and seen like three times. To me it I enjoy it since it was powerfully deep, but also amazing on the physical conflict level as well like no other animated movie I seen so far. Not to mention I love the art direction too.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Apr 02, 2009 7:34 pm I really enjoy the first half, instrumentality gets boring after the 3rd go through. Its also something that if i'm watching on my tv, i have to worry about people who havnt seen it or a lot of anime and their looks of shear confusion. I remember the first time i saw it was at a friends house and no one else had seen the series, so whenever people came to see what i was watching they were all wtf?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Apr 02, 2009 7:51 pm For me, it's the kind of movie that you can't really watch all the way through. I remember the whole thing, but it's way too trippy to see all at once anymore. And any movie that I can't watch in a single sitting is a movie that isn't anywhere near my top ten list.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Apr 02, 2009 8:09 pm Not even close.

[]:             Quote Post by danmilligan » Thu Apr 02, 2009 8:45 pm I can't stand EoE, as sweet as the Asuka fight scene may be... That movie totally succeeds at its intent of making me sick to my stomach

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Thu Apr 02, 2009 9:10 pm Probably is my favorite, if there was a way to rank such things in my head. I can't think of a movie I've watched more than Eva anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Apr 02, 2009 9:18 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 02, 2009 9:35 pm It's one of my favorites, yes.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 02, 2009 9:58 pm Not especially. Shinji's flagrant douchebagishness in the movie drags it down a few notches.

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:23 pm Unfortunately no but still an enjoyable flick if you can tolerate the mind-bashing, second-half of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:39 pm LIGHTFIRELT wrote: Unfortunately no but still an enjoyable flick if you can tolerate the mind-bashing, second-half of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Thu Apr 02, 2009 10:53 pm You are aware of what the word flick means right? No, not chick-flick, just the freakin word flick. And by all accounts, it is a film (regardless of the content) so that settles that.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:17 pm BrikHaus wrote: Not even close.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 02, 2009 11:18 pm I like the second half way more than the first half. I'm really not sure how to rate it, though... I wasn't that impressed upon my initial viewing, but my opinion of it has grown dramatically over time.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Apr 03, 2009 1:44 am Hey, it may be one of the best ANIME movies out there, but, I have to admit, I've seen a whole bunch of movies that I won't even mention that make EoE looks dented. Not that it's not a great movie, just that I think you've gotta be one really hardcore anime fan to have EoE as your favourite anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Apr 03, 2009 1:49 am Of course it's my favorite, it's the got all the key elements of a awesome movie: Giant, naked white women with a vagina on her forehead; jerking off over a comatose redhead; Orange Juice; Pedophile Women; bitter sweet endings; and last but not least, Mind Fuckery. Oh yeah, this is definitely my favorite.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Fri Apr 03, 2009 4:46 am Without a doubt. Animation, images, music, ideas, atmospheres of EoE=best movie.
